name: minecraft-llm-bot
description: Mineflayer-based Minecraft bot with chat commands, survival automation, and optional LLM control

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/app/main.js && node --check src/bot/ai-bot.js && node --check src/config/index.js && node --check src/services/llm/llm-client.js && node --check src/storage/auth-store.js
